news.headline: Big Lift appoints Martin Boyd as CMO and Jason Dunigan as VP of Sales for Big Joe and EP North America brands.
news.summary: Big Lift has recently made key appointments within its leadership team. Martin Boyd has been appointed as the Chief Marketing Officer, and Jason Dunigan as the Vice President of Sales for Big Joe and EP North America brands. The company, headquartered in Madison, Wisconsin, is aiming to leverage Boyd's expertise in marketing and Dunigan's sales acumen to drive growth and enhance market presence. This move comes as part of Big Lift's strategic efforts to strengthen its position in the industry.

news.headline: Research report predicts Deployable Military Shelters market to increase from $992.9M in 2023 to $1.1B by 2030, due to rising global tensions and demand for peacekeeping missions.
news.summary: A report titled "Deployable Military Shelters - Global Strategic Business Report" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The worldwide market for Deployable Military Shelters had an estimated value of US$992.9 million in 2023, with projections indicating it will rise to US$1.1 billion by 2030, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 1.4% within this period. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market trends, influential factors, and future predictions to assist in making well-informed business choices regarding deployable military shelters.

news.headline: Ex-Tory MP criticizes UK political parties for neglecting crypto, calling it a disservice to constituents. Campaigns should address the issue.
news.summary: Former chair of the UK Crypto Parliamentary Group, Dr. Lisa Cameron, has emphasized the importance of including discussions on cryptocurrency in the upcoming election campaign. Dr. Cameron stressed the need for political parties to address this issue, indicating its significance in the current landscape. Her statement highlights the growing importance of cryptocurrencies, showcasing how they have become a key topic for consideration in political discourse.

news.headline: HoneyBook introduces finance tools for independent businesses in San Francisco.
news.summary: A new suite of tools called HoneyBook Finance has been launched in San Francisco, aiming to streamline finances and provide valuable insights for independent businesses. The suite offers a variety of financial tools and resources to assist businesses in managing their finances efficiently.

news.headline: Zultys' Peter Gasparro wins Midwest Regional Channel Manager of the Year at 2024 Sandler Partners National Summit in Calif.
news.summary: Based in Huntington Beach, California, Zultys offers omnichannel unified communications and contact center solutions, known for high partner and customer satisfaction. They have a low industry churn rate. Recently, Peter Gasparro, Zultys' north central regional sales manager, was honored as the Sandler Partners Midwest Regional Channel Manager of the Year. This recognition was presented at the National Summit Awards Gala & Dinner. This acknowledgment highlights Gasparro's outstanding performance in his role.

news.headline: Cerio releases M&E Package in Ottawa, accelerates content creation for media & entertainment industry.
news.summary: Today in Ottawa, Ontario, the Cerio M&E Package was introduced, aimed at accelerating the creation of premium content efficiently. This release promises to boost content production speed and cost-effectiveness.

news.headline: Viral Nation launches Secure 2.0, AI brand reputation solution to enhance creator safety.

This update aims to target brand safety oversights, providing exceptional creator insights and brand security for companies seeking to carefully choose influencer collaborations in the constantly changing landscape. Viral Nation's platform leverages their inventive technology and social-oriented strategy to offer cutting-edge solutions to clients worldwide, emphasizing the importance of informed decision-making for successful influencer partnerships.

news.headline: Valer achieves HITRUST r2 Certification for their authorization platform in Huntington Beach, California.
news.summary: Valer, based in Huntington Beach, California, has recently obtained HITRUST r2 Certification for their platform specializing in prior authorization management. This certification signifies that Valer's platform complies with healthcare industry security regulations and standards. This achievement showcases Valer's commitment to ensuring the security and privacy of healthcare data. HITRUST r2 Certification is a significant milestone for the company and demonstrates their dedication to providing a secure and reliable platform for handling prior authorizations.

news.headline: Majesco's Copilot GenAI Assistant shows significant business impact with transformative results, revolutionizing insurance operations.
news.summary: A company based in Morristown, New Jersey, Majesco, known for its cloud insurance solutions worldwide, unveiled Majesco Copilot, a GenAI assistant, which has proven to greatly enhance operational efficiency and productivity in the insurance sector. This groundbreaking technology has set new standards for insurance practices, showing significant advancements in how tasks are handled. Majesco's intelligent solutions for Property and Casualty (P&C) and Life and Annuity (L&AH) sectors have been designed to meet the increasing operational requirements effectively.

news.headline: Robust.AI launches Carter™ Pro robot in San Carlos, CA, merging AI and innovative interaction models for maximum productivity.
news.summary: A new collaborative mobile robot named Carter™ Pro has been launched by Robust.AI in SAN CARLOS, Calif. This advanced robot utilizes AI technology and innovative interaction models to enhance its performance.

news.summary: CNM LLP, based in Woodland Hills, California, has recently achieved certification by Great Place To Work® for the fifth consecutive year. This recognition highlights the company's ongoing commitment to providing a positive work environment for its employees.

The results will be shared during a live webcast at 9:30 a.m. EDT on that day. Investors can access the webcast at investors.oshkoshcorp.com by logging on approximately 15 minutes before the event. Presentation slides will also be accessible on the website on the morning of October 30.

news.headline: Ruth Chepngetich sets new world record at Chicago Marathon, Catherine Debrunner breaks course record. John Korir second fastest.

news.headline: Mars appoints Nefertiti Greene as Global President of Veterinary Health and Katie Devine to lead Science & Diagnostics. Devine brings over 25 years' experience. Mars has been in pet care for almost 90 years.

Devine, with an extensive background of more than 25 years in consumer health and pharma, will be joining the team. Mars, a renowned player in the pet care industry for nearly 90 years, is expanding its reach into veterinary services.

Through structured dialogue and specialized training, the organization achieved notable improvements in its operational environment, possibly leading to more meaningful change.

news.headline: Global phishing protection market to reach $5.94 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 12.1% from 2023 to 2031.
news.summary: The market for phishing protection is projected to grow substantially, with an estimated size of US$ 5.94 billion by 2031, up from US$ 2.39 billion in 2023. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.1% from 2023 to 2031. The report, released by The Insight Partners, provides a detailed analysis of the global phishing landscape. The data was made public on October 16, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: UBS sponsors Art San Diego for 16th year, showcasing Access to Art program benefiting Monarch School students on Nov. 1-3.
news.summary: UBS will be sponsoring Art San Diego for the 16th consecutive year. The contemporary art fair will take place from November 1st to 3rd at the San Diego Convention Center. This event will showcase philanthropic Access to Art, highlighting the importance of art accessibility.

news.headline: Europe hyperscale data center market to reach $45.65 billion by 2029 with a 6.44% CAGR. Demand rises with companies like Ferrovial and Arup leading the way.
news.summary: A recent report on the Europe Hyperscale Data Center Market predicts significant growth in the industry. Valued at USD 31.39 Billion in 2023, the market is projected to reach USD 45.65 Billion by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.44%. One key factor driving this growth is the Climate Neutral Data Center Pact, aimed at enhancing the sustainability of European data centers. Signatories of this pact are committed to achieving climate neutrality by 2030.

news.headline: Leeward Renewable Energy creates The LRE Foundation with $450,000 raised at a charity golf tournament.
news.summary: Leeward Renewable Energy (LRE), a prominent player in the renewable energy sector, has introduced The LRE Foundation, a non-profit organization recognized under 501(c)(3) tax exemption, with a primary focus on environmental stewardship, health and safety, and education. Noteworthy, the foundation successfully gathered a significant sum of $450,000 through its inaugural event, the LRE Foundation Charity Golf Tournament, held recently. Expressing delight over the establishment, company representatives commended the dedication of their employees and expressed gratitude for their overwhelming support.

news.headline: SPAR Group calls special meeting to approve merger with Highwire Capital in $230 million all cash transaction.
news.summary: SPAR Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGRP), based in Auburn Hills, Michigan, is urging its stockholders to vote in favor of the proposed acquisition by Highwire Capital. The Agreement and Plan of Merger, signed on August 30, 2024, outlines the all-cash transaction in which Highwire Capital will acquire SPAR Group. This move aims to further enhance the services provided by SPAR Group in merchandising, marketing, and distribution sectors. Stockholders are encouraged to participate in this process to ensure the completion of the acquisition.

news.headline: Nokia's upcoming earnings report on 2024-10-17 estimated at an EPS of $0.08. Stock currently at $4.41, up 39.25% in 52 weeks. Analysts rate it as Outperform with a price target of $6.5, suggesting a 47.39% potential upside. Last quarter the company beat EPS by $0.01.
news.summary: Nokia (NYSE:NOK) is scheduled to report its quarterly earnings on October 17, 2024. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.08. Investors anticipate surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. In the previous quarter, Nokia exceeded EPS by $0.01, leading to a 0.83% increase in share price the following day. As of October 15, Nokia shares were trading at $4.41, up 39.25% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts rate Nokia as Outperform, with an average one-year price target of $6.5, indicating a potential 47.39% upside. The article provides further insights and analysis available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Vishay Intertechnology adds 350V and 500V to 600V capacitors to expand capacitance-voltage combos.
news.summary: New capacitors rated at 350 volts and 500 to 600 volts have been introduced to increase the range of available capacitance-voltage combinations. The addition of these capacitors allows for a wider selection of voltage options for capacitance values in electronic devices. This expansion in voltage ratings provides more flexibility for engineers and designers in choosing the appropriate components for their specific applications.

This recognition is a testament to the company's commitment to ensuring a positive work environment, with a high level of employee satisfaction and retention rates. The accolade highlights the company's success in promoting a healthy and fulfilling work culture, with commendable initiatives and programs in place.

Huddle Up appoints Tyra Mariani to board, emphasizing children's growth and mental health.

news.headline: S&P Global predicts emerging markets will fuel global economic growth in the next decade. Look Forward report analyzes opportunities and challenges.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, S&P Global released the most recent installment of its Look Forward research series. This report analyzes the potential opportunities and obstacles that emerging markets may face in the next ten years regarding the shift towards cleaner energy sources and supply. The findings highlight the forecasted economic growth in these markets and the focus on energy transition initiatives. The report delves into the challenges that need to be addressed to ensure a successful transition, providing insights on how these markets can adapt and thrive in the evolving global landscape.

news.headline: Miyavi appointed as Creative Director of Donner Music, responsible for design of musical instrument lines from Oct 2024.
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 16, 2024, a statement was released announcing that MIYAVI has accepted the role of Creative Director at Donner. Beginning this month, the esteemed guitarist will oversee the design and creative aspects of Donner's diverse range of musical instruments. This collaboration between Donner and MIYAVI marks a significant development for the company's product lines.

news.headline: Workforce challenges persist in outpatient physical therapy clinics per new report by APTA, highlighting ongoing hiring difficulties.
news.summary: According to the latest report from the American Physical Therapy Association, the physical therapy industry is encountering persistent difficulties in recruiting qualified professionals. The report, released on October 16, 2024, in Alexandria, Virginia, highlights the ongoing hiring challenges within the profession. The American Physical Therapy Association collaborated with APTA Private Practice, a specialized section of the association, to compile this third annual workforce report. This news emphasizes the significance of addressing the shortage of physical therapists to meet the healthcare demands, reflecting the growing need for these services.

news.headline: Climate XChange launches State Climate Policy Dashboard, a comprehensive database for state climate policy, offering accurate and reliable data.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Climate XChange revealed the State Climate Policy Dashboard, a new database providing extensive information on state climate policy. This resource aims to meet the increasing demand for reliable data to assist in understanding and addressing climate issues. With its launch, the Dashboard promises to offer unparalleled access to crucial information for researchers, policymakers, and the public.

news.headline: New at Mistral AI: unveils Ministral models- 3B and 8B for edge computing. These promising models boost low-latency and efficient performance stats.

These cutting-edge models are designed for edge computing, offering exceptional performance and minimal latency across a wide range of applications. news.headline: Canadian weed company Avant Brands Inc. sees record quarterly revenue of CA$8.5 million, with 30% increase from last year. CEO highlights international sales growth and partnerships as key to global success in cannabis market.
news.summary: Avant Brands Inc. (OTCQX:AVTBF), a Canadian cannabis producer based in British Columbia, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter ending on August 31, 2024. The company achieved a milestone revenue of CA$8.5 million ($6.17 million), marking a 30% rise compared to the corresponding period the previous year. Norton Singhavon, the CEO and founder of Avant Brands, expressed his satisfaction, stating that the company is swiftly solidifying its position as a key player in the global cannabis sector. With robust growth in international sales, alongside new licensing agreements and partnerships, Avant Brands is well-positioned for ongoing success in expanding its premium product lines like blk mk worldwide. In related news, Avant Brands continues its international expansion efforts, contributing significantly to its 4% year-over-year increase in net revenue during the second quarter. For further insights and cannabis industry updates, subscribe to Benzinga's newsletter for free and access the full article on their website.

news.headline: Crypto Policy Scorecard compares Trump, Harris, and Biden on cryptocurrency. Thorn sees potential upside with Trump win. Harris could be more supportive than Biden. Bitcoin should fare well, altcoins benefit from Trump win. Biden's admin supports SEC in regulation.
news.summary: Alex Thorn of Galaxy Research conducted a policy scorecard that compares the cryptocurrency stances of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Donald Trump. He believes that a Harris victory has limited downside risk, while a Trump win could lead to explosive upside for the industry. Bitcoin is expected to perform well regardless of the election outcome, but altcoins are anticipated to benefit more from a Trump presidency. Thorn pointed out Biden's support for the SEC's regulatory approach and lack of vocal support for a market structure bill. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: T. Rowe Price appoints Ben Riley as Head of Insurance, effective Jan 1, 2025, to enhance focus on Insurance segment.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 16, 2024, T. Rowe Price, a prominent global investment management firm, revealed its strategic move to enhance focus on the Insurance segment. Ben Riley, CFA®, has been promoted to the new position of Head of Insurance, with the appointment set to take effect on January 1, 2025. This development underscores the firm's commitment to expanding its operations in the insurance sector under Riley's leadership.

news.headline: Care for Lives is transforming home healthcare in NY on Oct 19th. Led by CEO Vanessa Chambers, groundbreaking services are set to change lives.
news.summary: On October 19th, 2024, in New York City, a pioneering home health care concierge service called Care for Lives, spearheaded by CEO Vanessa Chambers, will be introduced. This service aims to revolutionize the home healthcare industry and has the potential to significantly impact lives. The launch event is scheduled for October 19th in New York City.

news.headline: Ibex Reserve near Riyadh becomes first Saudi protected area on IUCN Green List, joining global standards.
news.summary: The Ibex Reserve, located south of Riyadh, has been recognized as meeting the global gold standard for protected and conserved areas. This recognition highlights the commitment to conservation efforts in the area, showcasing its alignment with international standards.
